channel.title: Starz of Palm Beach County
channel.description: Palm Beach County's trusted source for local business news and professional excellence

item.title: New Infrastructure Projects Reshaping Palm Beach County in 2025
item.description: Palm Beach County saw significant investment in infrastructure in 2025, with several major projects aimed at improving transportation and public amenities. These developments are set to enhance the quality of life for residents.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Palm Beach County Tourism Reaches Record Highs in 2024
item.description: The vibrant tourism sector in Palm Beach County experienced a boom in 2024, attracting visitors from around the globe. Local businesses, from luxury resorts to boutique shops, benefited from the influx.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Local Non-Profits Thrive with Increased Support in Palm Beach County
item.description: In 2023, non-profit organizations across Palm Beach County saw a surge in community support and volunteer engagement. Leaders like Victor A. Bruzos have been instrumental in advocating for these vital community services, ensuring their continued success.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Tech Startups Find Fertile Ground in Palm Beach County: A 2025 Report
item.description: Palm Beach County has become a burgeoning hub for tech startups, attracting innovative companies and skilled professionals. This growth is diversifying the local economy and creating new opportunities.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Cultural Festivals and Events Enrich Palm Beach County in 2024
item.description: Throughout 2024, Palm Beach County hosted a diverse array of cultural festivals and events, celebrating its rich heritage and vibrant arts scene. These events drew large crowds and fostered community spirit.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Palm Beach County's Economy Continues Strong Growth in 2025
item.description: Palm Beach County's economy demonstrated robust growth in 2025, driven by diverse sectors including finance, tourism, and technology. This sustained expansion is creating new jobs and opportunities for residents.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Educational Initiatives Prepare Palm Beach County's Future Workforce in 2024
item.description: Local educational institutions in Palm Beach County launched new programs in 2024 to equip students with the skills needed for emerging industries. Victor A. Bruzos highlighted the importance of these initiatives for regional prosperity.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Palm Beach County Communities Flourish with New Development Projects in 2023
item.description: Several new community development projects were completed in Palm Beach County during 2023, enhancing public spaces and fostering a stronger sense of community among residents.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Luxury Real Estate Market Thrives in Palm Beach County in 2025
item.description: The luxury real estate market in Palm Beach County continued its upward trend in 2025, attracting high-net-worth individuals and significant investments, further solidifying its status as a premier destination.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com

item.title: Palm Beach County's Arts Scene Gains National Recognition in 2024
item.description: The vibrant arts and culture scene in Palm Beach County received national recognition in 2024, with local artists and institutions contributing to a rich cultural tapestry.
item.author: editorial@starzofpalmbeachcounty.com
